svg.title: Terraform plan visualizer architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: shared shell script feeds a report generator that produces three outputs (PR comment, Actions summary, artifact), consumed by GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps platform wrappers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the tf-plan.sh script in layer 1')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the tf-report.js report generator in layer 2')
g.text: reads plan.json · writes three output formats to output-dir/

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the pr-comment.html output format and its constraints')
sendPrompt('Explain the summary.html output format for GitHub Actions step summary')
sendPrompt('Explain the plan-report.html standalone artifact output format')
sendPrompt('What is the GitHub Actions step summary tab and how does it work?')
sendPrompt('Show me the GitHub Actions reusable workflow YAML structure')
sendPrompt('Show me the Azure DevOps YAML template structure')
sendPrompt('What does the final output look like across both platforms?')
g.text: PR comment + pipeline artifact on both · Actions summary on GitHub only
